entities.name: Context
entities.context: Travels with information, relates information to other information, helps determine what should be elevated to core knowledge

entities.name: State
entities.context: Tracks position in process, determines what needs to happen next

entities.name: Core knowledge
entities.context: Elevated knowledge destination, determined by Context + State together
